straytags.config.title: StrayTags Configuration
straytags.config.debug_commands.tooltip: Enable /straytags test, testuser, verbose, and debug commands
straytags.config.advanced_mode.tooltip: Show advanced options like per-category regex, server filters, and the server-level name pattern. Save and reopen to apply.
straytags.config.neutral_format.tooltip: MiniMessage format for players with clans that don't match any category
straytags.config.no_clan_format.tooltip: MiniMessage format for players without a clan
straytags.config.name_pattern.tooltip: Regex pattern to parse nametags. Must have named groups: username, clan (optional)
straytags.config.export_full.tooltip: Copy this code and send it to another player. They can paste it into Import to get your config.
straytags.config.import_full.tooltip: Paste a config code here and click Save to import. This will overwrite your current categories and formats.
